behavior.reducedMotion: Show the final state with numbered steps and no automatic movement.

accessibility.altText: Reuse the visual vocabulary, then adapt the communication contract. Researcher, investor, and plain-language Chinese versions share the same evidence.
accessibility.readingOrder: title, primary visual, evidence annotation, source, receipt
accessibility.mobile: Single-column semantic stack with the visual before detail.

narrativeJobs: Researcher, investor, and plain-language Chinese versions share the same evidence.
